name: Red Snapper Red
recipeIngredient: 1 Red snapper (1 1/2 lb); boned and filleted with skin on
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the red snapper fillets with salt and cayenne.
2. Heat olive oil in a 9-inch heavy, nonstick skillet over medium heat.
3. Add diced onions to the hot oil and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally until they become translucent.
4. Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute.
5. Add chopped tomatoes and red wine to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to maintain a simmer.
6. Place the fillets skin side down on top of the tomato and onion mixture.
7. Cover the skillet and cook for 6 minutes.
8. Remove the fillets from the skillet and place them on a heated serving platter.
9. Spoon the sauce over the fish fillets.
Per serving: 322 cal; 53g pro, 6g carb, 6g fat (17%), 95mg chol, 435mg sodium
Exchanges: .9 veg, 5.6 meat, .5 fat
